narrativeProgression.summary: A voicemail includes background audio from a location not yet disclosed.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: The villain mixes real secrets with fabricated claims to split allies.

Cross-day mismatch suggests archival tampering tied to Blood-soil composition panel.

evidenceDrops.title: The Harvest Men - Day 13 police report
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Blood-soil composition panel.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: The Harvest Men ARG artifact Day 13. Type: police_report. Clue focus: Blood-soil composition panel. Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds. Phase: Escalation & Unease. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: The Harvest Men police_report audio cue for day 13. Clue anchor: Blood-soil composition panel. Phase: Escalation & Unease. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Blood-soil composition panel and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_12.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Blood-soil composition panel.
You chose {{last_major_choice}} and still think this is about evidence. Check the mirror timestamp and decide who you are willing to sacrifice.

distraction.title: Red Herring 13
distraction.summary: A polished leak points toward an emotionally satisfying suspect, but timeline math does not support it.
distraction.whyItFeelsPlausible: It references Blood-soil composition panel with convincing formatting and apparent chain-of-custody metadata.
distraction.hiddenFault: Embedded timezone marker is impossible for the claimed capture device, indicating staged fabrication.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if trusted contact changed within last 3 days
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: Your channel loyalty shifted to {{trusted_contact}}. That tells me what you fear most.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
